'''âm-k-z''' ('''kamakaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quickload|quickload]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quickload|quickload]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-k-z
|-
! Lemma
| kamakaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimakaz|thimakaz]] || [[word:jimakaz|jimakaz]] || [[word:shimakaz|shimakaz]] || [[word:kimakaz|kimakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumakaz|thuthumakaz]] || [[word:jujumakaz|jujumakaz]] || [[word:shushumakaz|shushumakaz]] || [[word:kukumakaz|kukumakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumakaz|thumakaz]] || [[word:jumakaz|jumakaz]] || [[word:shumakaz|shumakaz]] || [[word:kumakaz|kumakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumakaz|thumakaz]] || [[word:jumakaz|jumakaz]] || [[word:shumakaz|shumakaz]] || [[word:kumakaz|kumakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themakaz|themakaz]] || [[word:jemakaz|jemakaz]] || [[word:shemakaz|shemakaz]] || [[word:kemakaz|kemakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomakaz|thothomakaz]] || [[word:jojomakaz|jojomakaz]] || [[word:shoshomakaz|shoshomakaz]] || [[word:kokomakaz|kokomakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomakaz|thomakaz]] || [[word:jomakaz|jomakaz]] || [[word:shomakaz|shomakaz]] || [[word:komakaz|komakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomakaz|thomakaz]] || [[word:jomakaz|jomakaz]] || [[word:shomakaz|shomakaz]] || [[word:komakaz|komakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmakaz|thĂŠmakaz]] || [[word:jĂŠmakaz|jĂŠmakaz]] || [[word:shĂŠmakaz|shĂŠmakaz]] || [[word:kĂŠmakaz|kĂŠmakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamakaz|thathamakaz]] || [[word:jajamakaz|jajamakaz]] || [[word:shashamakaz|shashamakaz]] || [[word:kakamakaz|kakamakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamakaz|thamakaz]] || [[word:jamakaz|jamakaz]] || [[word:shamakaz|shamakaz]] || [[word:kamakaz|kamakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamakaz|thamakaz]] || [[word:jamakaz|jamakaz]] || [[word:shamakaz|shamakaz]] || [[word:kamakaz|kamakaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamakaz|shamakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamakaz|goshamakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamakaz|gokishamakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamakaznĂŒ|shamakaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamakaznknĂŒ|goshamakaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamakaznĂŒ|gokishamakaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamakazshĂ«|shamakazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamakaznkshĂ«|goshamakaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamakazshĂ«|gokishamakazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamakazro|shamakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamakaznkro|goshamakaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamakazro|gokishamakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamakazmu|shamakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamakaznkmu|goshamakaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamakazmu|gokishamakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamakazsher|shamakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamakaznksher|goshamakaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamakazsher|gokishamakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamakazng|shamakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamakaznkng|goshamakaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamakazng|gokishamakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamakazya|shamakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamakaznkya|goshamakaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamakazya|gokishamakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamakazyam|shamakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamakaznkyam|goshamakaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamakazyam|gokishamakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamakaznĂŒshĂ«|shamakaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamakaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshamakaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamakaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishamakaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamakaznĂŒro|shamakaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamakaznknĂŒro|goshamakaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamakaznĂŒro|gokishamakaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamakaznĂŒmu|shamakaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamakaznknĂŒmu|goshamakaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamakaznĂŒmu|gokishamakaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamakazshĂ«nĂŒ|shamakazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamakaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamakaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamakazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamakazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamakazshĂ«ro|shamakazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamakaznkshĂ«ro|goshamakaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamakazshĂ«ro|gokishamakazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamakazshĂ«mu|shamakazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamakaznkshĂ«mu|goshamakaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamakazshĂ«mu|gokishamakazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamakazronĂŒ|shamakazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamakaznkronĂŒ|goshamakaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamakazronĂŒ|gokishamakazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamakazroshĂ«|shamakazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamakaznkroshĂ«|goshamakaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamakazroshĂ«|gokishamakazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamakazromu|shamakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamakaznkromu|goshamakaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamakazromu|gokishamakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamakazmunĂŒ|shamakazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamakaznkmunĂŒ|goshamakaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamakazmunĂŒ|gokishamakazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamakazmushĂ«|shamakazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamakaznkmushĂ«|goshamakaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamakazmushĂ«|gokishamakazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamakazmuro|shamakazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamakaznkmuro|goshamakaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamakazmuro|gokishamakazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
